user_feedback: my energy blade seems to be just a gun, I want it to be an actual sword, can you fix that?
analysis:
- Issue identified: The energy blade attack currently spawns a projectile (EnergySlash) that travels forward like a gun shot, instead of performing a melee sword slash attack
- Files affected: player.js
- Changes needed: Modify the `attack` method in player.js to perform melee damage in an arc in front of the player instead of spawning a ranged projectile. Add visual sword slash effects using particles.
